commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Your first father has sinned, and your teachers have transgressed against me. First father. Adam, (Lyranus) or rather Abraham sinned, by diffidence, (Genesis xv. Jerome) or was formerly an idolater, Josue xxiv. (Genebrard, the year of the world 2049) (St. Augustine, City of God xvi. ) (Calmet) (Tirinus) Teachers. Literally, "interpreters "(Haydock) Moses and Aaron, Numbers xx. (Calmet) All the patriarchs and teachers sinned, till Christ, the immaculate lamb, appeared. Adam engaged all in guilt. (Worthington).
